title: ARCHIVED - 16-5 Voluntary Disclosures Program (Application Received from March 1, 2018, Through September 30, 2025)  - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - 16-5 Voluntary Disclosures Program (Application Received from March 1, 2018 , Through September 30, 2025 )

## Notice to the reader:
This memorandum applies to Voluntary Disclosures Program applications received on or after March 1, 2018 and prior to October 1, 2025. For applications received on or after October 1, 2025, refer to GST/HST Memorandum 16-5-1, Voluntary Disclosures Program (Applications Received On or After October 1, 2025) .
You can view this publication in:
Last update: 2017-12-15
While all Canada Revenue Agency web content is accessible, we also provide our forms and publications in alternate formats (digital audio, electronic text, Braille, and large print) to allow persons with disabilities to access the information they need.
